titleStmt.title: SII 37.441: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 441. (A.R. No. E 53 of 1941-42.) Vāḍapalli, Suryapet Taluk, Nalgonda District.

summary.p: Slab in the Vīrabhadra temple in the fort.
Sultans of Gōlkoṇḍa: Muhammad Quli Qutub Shah.
This is dated Śaka 1522, Vikāri, Kārttīka, ba. 13, Monday corresponding to 1599 A.D., November 5.

It records the gift of Vartanas by the Vīramushṭis of all countries to god Śṛiṅgāra Vīrabhadra. It was accordingly declared that the devotees need not pay the Vartanas to the Vīramushṭis but instead pay to the god. Similarly the Tammalas, Balejas, Gauḍas and others granted to the god the Vartanas accruable to them.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śaka va¨rṣaṁbulu 1522
Agunēṭi . vikāri saṁvvatsara kā¨rti
ka bahuḷa 13 sō nāḍu vāḍapalli śriṁ
ggāra vīrabhadṛni mukhamaṁḍapānanu śāsa
nakaṁbhaṁ vēyiṁcina kramamu yeṭlaṁnnanu nā
ṭikālavīramuṣṇuḍuṁnnu puṁṇyamugānu vā
ḍapalli śriṁgāravīrabhadṛniki puṁṇyamugānu
bhikṣāvritti Ayyavāri paṁpananu naṁdēlavuccu
vīrayya vōḍapalli nānā dēśāla vīra
muṣṇuluṁnnu yicci va¨rttana śriṁgāra vīrēśvaruniki
dhāravōstimi . dhūpadīpanaivēdyālaku kaṭṭaḍa
sistimi . nānādēśāla vīramuṣṇuluṁnnu [I]ccina
puḍu bhaktādula yiṁḍlanu yiṁṭiki vokaruṁnnu Ā
ragiṁcci vīrēśvaruni da¨rśiṁccipōyiri vīramuṣṇi va
¨rttana puccukonu panilēdu yiṁduku yevvaru muṁ
cci tappipuccukonarādu mahamadakhulli bādaśā
dāmikuśavēstēnu bhikṣāva¨rtti Ayyavārulaku tana
pputalayya pādālamīdi Anakādani kāśavēstimi
śivācārakulācārānaku veliyāṁṭānu
vōḍapalli vīrayyaku dhūpadīpanaivēdyālaku
taṁmmaḷlu balijavāru gauṁḍavāru
muppalaku yicci va¨rtana paikālu
ru Iccuvārunnayyaku
ni vadiṁcina pāpāna pō
lācāranaku veli
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇya
lanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
bhavēt . śrī śrī śrī jēyunu .
Aḍike¨rlapalli kaṁmala vōbhaḷayya komāruḍu
vōḍapalli vrāśina sāsanaṁ . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.441 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
